event: User slipped and fell, remaining stationary on the floor.

event: User is still sleeping in bed.

event: User is performing vigorous exercise and making loud noises.
reason: Anomaly: Abnormal behavior for this hour; potential mental health concern or disturbance.

event: Main door has been left open for more than 10 minutes.
reason: Security risk: Unexpected breach of home perimeter.

event: User is standing on a ladder/chair to reach a high shelf.
reason: Safety hazard: Risk of falling from height.

event: User has not gotten out of bed (past usual wake-up time).
reason: Habit deviation: Potential illness or oversleeping (Usual: 07:00-07:15 Wake up).

event: User has been sitting continuously for over 60 minutes without standing.
reason: Health advice: Sedentary behavior exceeds threshold (Usual: Hourly break).

event: User is packing a bag to go out.

event: No breakfast preparation or eating activity detected yet.
reason: Health concern: Risk of skipping meals (Usual: 08:30 Breakfast).

event: User went straight to bed without brushing teeth/washing face.

event: User has not performed the habitual blood pressure measurement.

event: User finished breakfast but has not taken medication.
reason: Health adherence: Missed medication time (Usual: 08:45 Medicine).

event: User has been working for 2 hours continuously without a break.
reason: Health advice: Need to stretch/move to prevent fatigue.

event: User is typing on the keyboard and yawning, without having gone to the kitchen for coffee.
reason: Habit deviation: User missed the daily morning coffee routine (Usual: 09:00), potentially affecting productivity.

event: User is operating the coffee machine to brew the 4th cup of the day.
reason: Rule violation: Exceeds the daily limit of 3 cups of coffee (Rule R002).

event: User has been using the computer for over 2 hours.
reason: Health advice: Eye strain prevention.

event: User left a fruit knife on the living room floor after opening a package.
reason: Critical Safety: Imminent risk of injury to children/pets (World Knowledge).

event: User is eating lunch on the sofa.
reason: Rule violation: Eating on the sofa is explicitly forbidden (Rule R004).

event: User is still typing on the computer and has not prepared lunch.
reason: Health concern: User missed the daily lunch window (Usual: 12:00-12:45), risk of skipping meals.

event: User is still scrolling through news on the tablet.

event: User is lying in bed using a smartphone.
reason: Sleep hygiene: Screen time interferes with sleep schedule (Rule R006).

event: User is eating lunch at the dining table while scrolling through videos on a smartphone.
reason: Rule violation: Electronic devices are forbidden at the dining table while eating (Rule R008).

event: User is still browsing the iPad (checking news).
reason: Habit deviation: User missed the start of the daily meditation routine (Usual: 08:00).

event: User is not in the study for the scheduled weekly video conference.

event: User has not started drafting the daily summary.

event: User has not initiated the weekly family video call.
reason: Habit deviation: Missed weekly connection routine (Usual: Sat 20:00 Call).

event: User is still playing games.
reason: Habit deviation: Activity exceeds even the flexible weekend limit.

event: User returned from dog walking but left trash bag at the door.

event: Laundry cycle finished long ago, but user hasn't hung clothes.
reason: Task completion: Wet clothes risk smelling (Usual: Wed 21:10 Laundry).

event: Dirty dishes have been in the sink for over 2 hours.
reason: Hygiene rule: Violation of cleanliness standard.

event: User has not watered the plants yet.
reason: Habit deviation/Mandatory task: Missed deadline (Usual: Fri 08:40 Watering).

event: User is still sleeping on the sofa (past the 13:40 wake-up time).
reason: Schedule adherence: Oversleeping risks interfering with the 14:00 Deep Work session.

event: User is eating potato chips on the sofa while browsing the tablet.
reason: Rule violation: Snacking on the sofa is explicitly forbidden (Rule R004).

event: Full house cleaning has not been performed.
reason: Habit deviation/Mandatory task: Missed deadline (Usual: Sat 10:00 Cleaning).

event: User is sleeping without a blanket while room temperature dropped below 18°C.
reason: Environment logic: Sleeping body temperature drops; risk of catching a cold.

event: Weekly laundry has not been done.
reason: Habit deviation/Mandatory task: Missed deadline (Usual: Sun 21:10 Laundry).

event: Recyclable waste bins are still inside.
reason: Habit deviation: Missed trash pickup window (Usual: Tue 08:15 Bins).

event: User entered home 5 minutes ago and has not washed hands.
reason: Habit deviation: Violation of 'wash hands upon entry' routine.

event: User is watching the morning news on TV.
reason: Task Deadline: The deadline (Friday 10:00) for watering plants has passed (Rule R012).

event: User has fallen asleep on the sofa, but the kitchen stove is still detected as 'ON'.
reason: Critical Safety: Fire hazard due to unattended stove (Violates Rule R010).

event: User walks out of the bedroom heading to the bathroom without having touched the iPad.
reason: Habit deviation: User missed the daily morning schedule/weather check routine (Usual: 07:15).

event: User has been sitting still at the desk for over 70 minutes without taking a break.
reason: Health advice: Sedentary behavior exceeds threshold (Triggers conditional routine: Hourly Stretching/Eye exercises).

event: User is still in the bathroom grooming (past the usual end time of 08:00).
reason: Schedule adherence: Current activity is delaying the next habitual event (08:00 Meditation).

event: User is eating biscuits at the desk while reading documents.
reason: Rule violation: Eating in the study is strictly forbidden (Rule R007).

event: User is meditating.
reason: Normal Events: Aligns with daily schedule.

event: User is playing PC games.
reason: Habit suppression: Friday night gaming is a known exception to sleep rules.

event: User is still watching TV/napping, missing the start of the Deep Work block.
reason: Schedule adherence: User is significantly delaying the critical 14:00-16:00 productivity window.

event: User is working with only the desk lamp on (ceiling light off).
reason: Personal preference: Recognized lighting habit for focus.

event: User is lounging on the sofa scrolling through social media, missing the daily planning session.
reason: Habit deviation: User is skipping the critical daily summary routine (Usual: 16:00), impacting research progress.

event: User is working on a laptop while having tea.
reason: Personal preference: Flexible workspace usage.

event: User enters kitchen to drink water.
reason: Biological need: Recognized erratic but normal behavior.

event: User is eating a sandwich while typing the daily summary.
reason: Rule violation: Eating in the study is strictly forbidden (Rule R007).

event: User turned off ceiling light and kept desk lamp on.
reason: Personal preference: Lighting habit.

event: User is using the toilet.
reason: Biological need: Normal physiological event.

event: It started raining outside while clothes are hanging on the rack.
reason: Environment logic: Rain will ruin dry clothes.

event: User collapsed on the floor after jumping and has remained motionless for 30 seconds.
reason: Critical Safety: Potential cardiac event or injury detected via pose estimation.

event: User is still intensely working at the desk, skipping the scheduled break/snack.
reason: Health advice: User missed the afternoon break window (Usual: 16:40 Snack/Stretch), increasing fatigue.

event: User is sitting on the sofa eating an apple.
reason: Rule violation: Snacking on the sofa is explicitly forbidden (Rule R004).

event: User has left for the dog walk, but the main door smart lock is not engaged.
reason: Security risk: Perimeter breach detected during user absence.

event: User is chatting on the phone in the living room while the kitchen stove is active (absent > 30s).
reason: Critical Safety: Fire hazard; violates Rule R010 (Human presence required when stove is on).

event: User is still watching TV.
reason: Schedule adherence: Delay impacts pet welfare (dog needs exercise/relief).

event: Room temperature is below 18°C and user is wearing short sleeves.
reason: Environment logic: Risk of catching a cold.

event: User filled the food bowl and left, but the water bowl is detected as empty/dry.
reason: Health logic: Pets require fresh water with meals; incomplete care routine detected.

event: Smoke density is high while user is cooking.
reason: Safety hazard: Need ventilation to prevent alarm/health issues.

event: User is still sedentary at the desk.
reason: Health advice: Consistent exercise is key; user is at risk of breaking the daily habit streak.

event: User is watching TV, and the dog's food bowl is detected as empty.
reason: Task completion: Animal welfare concern; user missed the daily feeding schedule.

event: Heavy rain is detected outside just before the scheduled outdoor routine.
reason: Environment logic: Suggest taking an umbrella/raincoat or delaying the walk.

event: User started working early, skipping the 08:30 breakfast routine.
reason: Health concern: Skipping breakfast affects morning cognitive performance.

event: User is using a metal fork to try and get toast out of a plugged-in toaster.
reason: Critical Safety: High risk of electric shock (World Knowledge).

event: User is cleaning the bathroom with bleach and has closed the door and window completely.
reason: Safety hazard: Toxic fume accumulation (chloroform/chlorine); requires immediate ventilation.

event: User is watching sports on TV.
reason: Schedule adherence: Missed the 16:30 weekly piano session.

event: User is eating a bowl of grapes while sitting on the sofa.
reason: Rule violation: Fruit snacks are permitted but NOT on the sofa (Rule R004).

event: The AQI (Air Quality Index) outside is over 200, but all windows are wide open.
reason: Environment logic: Poor outdoor air quality; suggest closing windows and turning on the purifier.

event: User is wearing a VR headset in bed.
reason: Rule violation: High-intensity electronic device usage after 23:00 (Rule R006).

event: User is defrosting meat on the counter in direct sunlight for several hours.
reason: Health logic: Improper food thawing increases bacterial growth; suggest refrigeration.

event: User enters the bedroom carrying a full dog food bowl.
reason: Rule violation: Feeding pets in the bedroom is strictly forbidden (Rule R003).

event: User is detected brewing coffee.
reason: Rule violation: Coffee is strictly forbidden after 20:00 (Rule R001).

event: User is watching TV, while the kettle in the kitchen has been boiling for >5 minutes (unattended).
reason: Critical Safety: Fire/Scald hazard; violates stove attendance rule (Rule R010).

event: User is putting on shoes and holding keys (preparing to leave).
reason: Departure logic: Trigger 'Leaving Home' checklist (water, gas, pet food).

event: User is reading a physical book with only the dim hallway light on (desk lamp off).
reason: Environment logic: Insufficient lighting during night study causes eye strain; suggest turning on the lamp.

event: User is eating a late-night snack (chips) while studying.
reason: Rule violation: Eating in the study is strictly forbidden (Rule R007).

event: User entered the bathroom with a smartphone and is scrolling while flossing.
reason: Rule violation: Electronic devices are forbidden in the bathroom (Rule R005).

event: User plugged in the phone but placed it under the pillow to charge.
reason: Critical Safety: Fire hazard due to battery overheating; suggest placing on nightstand.

event: User is cooking a snack.
reason: Schedule Adherence: User is absent from the living room during mandatory piano time (Rule R014).

event: User is brushing teeth, but the faucet has been running continuously for >60 seconds.
reason: Resource logic: Water waste detected; suggest turning off the tap while brushing.

event: User is actively using the smartphone in bed.
reason: Rule violation: Electronic devices are forbidden after 23:00 (Rule R006 overrides Habit).

event: User went straight from the study to the bed, skipping the bathroom routine entirely.
reason: Habit deviation: User missed the critical nightly hygiene routine (Skincare/Brushing).

event: Doorbell rings while user is working.
reason: Notification: User might miss the visitor due to focus/headphones.

event: User is still awake and active, missing the strict sleep start time (Usual: 23:30).
reason: Schedule adherence: Sleep deprivation risk; enforced bedtime is 23:30.

event: User is starting to brew tea.
reason: Health logic: Drinking fluids late at night may disrupt sleep.

event: User is detected as asleep, but no alarm is set for Monday morning.
reason: Task logic: Risk of oversleeping on a workday; Agent should ask or auto-set alarm.

event: Direct sunlight is hitting the screen; user is squinting.
reason: Environment logic: Glare affects comfort and vision.

event: User is still browsing the news on the tablet, missing the start of the weekly video conference.
reason: Schedule adherence: User is late for a scheduled professional commitment (Usual: Mon 10:00 Meeting).

event: User is using a loud blender/grinder just 5 minutes before the video conference starts.
reason: Context awareness: High noise levels usually disrupt upcoming professional meetings; suggest pausing.

event: User is performing the daily workout (jumping jacks) during the scheduled Blood Pressure check window.
reason: Medical logic: Blood pressure must be measured at a resting state. Exercise invalidates the reading (Conflict between Daily Workout and Monday Health Check).

event: User is still working.
reason: Health adherence: User is at risk of skipping the weekly physiological monitoring (Usual: Mon 18:00).

event: User is watching TV, neglecting the document organization routine.
reason: Task completion: Bi-weekly organization routine missed;

event: User is still engrossed in deep work, missing the start of the scheduled yoga session.
reason: Schedule adherence: User is neglecting the bi-weekly flexibility/relaxation routine (Usual: 19:30 Yoga).

event: It starts raining heavily as the laundry cycle begins on the balcony.
reason: Environment logic: Rain will dampen the area and make hanging clothes difficult/messy; suggest using a dryer mode if available.

event: User is setting up mobile charging, but no laundry activity was detected earlier.
reason: Task completion: User missed the bi-weekly laundry routine (Usual: Wed 21:10); risk of piling up dirty clothes.

event: Toddler is reaching for a knife on the counter.
reason: Critical Safety: Imminent risk of severe injury.

event: User has started working at the computer.
reason: Task completion: Friday watering routine missed; risk of plant dehydration in upcoming dry weekend.

event: User is lounging on the sofa.
reason: Schedule adherence: Friday afternoon communication is critical for closing out the work week.

event: User is eating a sandwich while typing replies to weekly emails.
reason: Rule violation: Eating in the study is strictly forbidden (Rule R007).

event: User is reading a comic book at the desk.
reason: Schedule Adherence: Current activity conflicts with the piano practice schedule (Rule R014).

event: User is still engrossed in a movie in the living room.
reason: Task logic: Detected a schedule overlap between two leisure activities; Agent should ask if the user wants to adjust the plan.

event: User is actively playing a PC game past the 23:00 cutoff.
reason: Rule violation: Electronic devices are strictly forbidden after 23:00 (Rule R006 overrides Habit).

event: User is eating snacks while gaming in the study.
reason: Rule violation: Eating in the study is strictly forbidden (Rule R007).

event: User is seen mixing two different chemical cleaners (e.g., bleach and an acid-based cleaner) while cleaning.
reason: Critical Safety: Chemical reaction risk (toxic gas); World Knowledge requires immediate intervention.

event: The floor is very wet after mopping, and the user is walking toward the area while looking at their phone.
reason: Safety logic: High risk of slipping and falling; Agent should warn the user about the wet floor.

event: Cleaning time has ended, but the bathroom remains untouched and cluttered.
reason: Task logic: The 'house cleaning' routine was incomplete; suggest finishing the remaining area.

event: User placed a glass of water/herbal tea on top of the piano while practicing.
reason: Asset protection: High risk of permanent damage to the instrument from liquid spills (World Knowledge).

event: User has been playing piano for 50 minutes without a break, showing signs of wrist tension.
reason: Health advice: Repetitive strain injury (RSI) prevention; suggest a short stretching break.

event: The tablet used for family calls is detected with only 8% battery, 10 minutes before the scheduled call.
reason: Task logic: Pre-emptive action to prevent the hour-long family call from being interrupted by a dead battery.

event: The video call with family has run late and is still active past 23:00.
reason: Rule violation: Electronic devices are strictly forbidden after 23:00 (Rule R006 overrides social activity).

event: The music volume is detected at 85dB in a quiet neighborhood.
reason: Social logic: Preventing noise complaints during rest hours; suggest lowering volume as midnight approaches.

event: User has just finished a quick set of push-ups and immediately starts the blood pressure measurement.
reason: Medical logic: Physical exertion spikes blood pressure; suggest resting for 5 minutes for an accurate reading.

event: User is drinking a cup of strong coffee just before the scheduled blood pressure check.
reason: Medical logic/Rule violation: Caffeine affects blood pressure accuracy (Rule R001/R002 context).

event: The vinyl player/sound system is still active and music is playing.
reason: Rule violation: Electronic devices and entertainment systems are strictly forbidden after 23:00 (Rule R006 overrides Habit).

event: The piano practice is running over time (past 17:30) and the volume is excessively loud during typical neighbor rest hours.
reason: Social logic: Preventing noise complaints and maintaining habit boundaries.

event: User is preparing the car wash kit, but the weather forecast predicts a 90% chance of rain in 3 hours.
reason: Efficiency logic: Manual car washing is labor-intensive; performing it before rain is unproductive. Suggest rescheduling.

event: The garage floor is covered in soapy water, and the user is walking around in smooth-soled flip-flops.
reason: Critical Safety: High slip-and-fall risk on wet concrete surfaces; suggest wearing high-traction boots.

event: It is the last day of the month, but the user is watching TV.
reason: Task completion: Rare monthly task (Photo Backup) is easily forgotten; proactive nudge required to ensure data safety.

event: User enters the study to start budgeting while still wearing damp, dirty clothes from the car wash.
reason: Hygiene logic: Transitioning from outdoor manual labor to a clean indoor workstation; suggest showering/changing to protect study furniture.

event: User has been in a 'Forward Head' posture (slouching) for over 60 minutes during deep work.
reason: Condition triggered: Pose estimation detects poor ergonomics; enforces the 'Hourly Stretching' conditional routine.

event: User is sitting on the sofa watching TV (piano is untouched).
